title: SQL union limitation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE union_test ( id INT, val1 VARCHAR(10), val2 VARCHAR(10), val3 FLOAT );
SELECT 'xyz' AS c1, 456 AS c2 UNION ALL SELECT val1 AS c1, val3 AS c2 FROM union_test WHERE val1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT val1 AS c1, CAST(val2 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS c2 FROM union_test UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS c1, 'test' AS c2;
key_bug_features: SQL union with incompatible data types
